case_title: ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ANGELICA ARGUETA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUETA, ANGELICA , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-15-2008
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-12-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED NOV-21-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUETA, ANGELICA , AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUETA, ANGELICA , AN INDIVIDUAL

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MOSHE SELIKOVITZ, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-12-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-27-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY CSR# 9225 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-12-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-25-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-25-2009 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Dismissal
